serverInfo.name: docx-forge-mcp
serverInfo.description: Production-grade Word document (.docx) creation and manipulation for AI agents — create, read, edit, merge, and export documents for contracts, reports, proposals, and compliance workflows
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Create a new .docx document from markdown or structured content

tools.name: read_document
tools.description: Extract text, paragraph list, headings, and metadata from an existing .docx file

tools.name: add_section
tools.description: Append a new heading + body section to an existing .docx document

tools.name: replace_text
tools.description: Find and replace text in a .docx document — ideal for template variable substitution

tools.name: add_table
tools.description: Insert a formatted table with bold header row into an existing .docx document

tools.name: merge_documents
tools.description: Combine multiple .docx files into a single merged document

tools.name: export_to_pdf
tools.description: Convert a .docx file to PDF via LibreOffice or pandoc (best effort)

tools.name: get_document_stats
tools.description: Return word count, page estimate, section count, and table count for a .docx file

resources.description: Step-by-step usage guide and workflow examples for document automation

pricing.free_limit: Unlimited — fully open source, runs locally
